title: Open Sony Vaio i5 Product Detail
goal: Open the Sony vaio i5 product detail page from the Demoblaze storefront and stop there.
instruction: On the Demoblaze storefront, open the Sony vaio i5 product page and stop when the product detail view is visible.
review_notes: First Demoblaze product-detail task. It exercises product-card targeting on a dynamic storefront.

steps.explanation: I waited briefly for the storefront product cards to finish loading.
I opened the Sony vaio i5 product detail page from the storefront listing.

action.summary: I opened the Sony vaio i5 product detail page and stopped there.

steps.explanation: The requested product page is open now, so I am ending the task.
